news.title: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
news.summary: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

news.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living

news.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
news.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
